press.example: Press the button to ring the bell.
The story was reported by the press.
press.example_zh: 這則消息被媒體報導了。

pressure.example: She felt pressure before the exam.
Don't pressure him to decide now.

pride.example: He looked at his work with pride.
pride.example_zh: 他驕傲地看著自己的作品。

priest.example: The priest spoke kindly to the people.
priest.example_zh: 神父和藹地對眾人說話。

primary.example: Her primary goal is to pass the exam.
primary.example_zh: 她的首要目標是通過考試。

primary.example: He teaches at a primary school.

prince-princess.example: The prince lived in a great castle.
prince-princess.example_zh: 王子住在一座宏偉的城堡裡。

principal.example: The principal welcomed the new students.
Rice is the principal food here.

principle.example_zh: 誠實是一項重要的原則。

print.example: Please print the report for me.
She bought a print of a famous painting.
print.example_zh: 她買了一幅名畫的複製品。

printer.example: The printer is out of paper.

prison.example: The thief was sent to prison.

prisoner.example: The prisoner waited for his trial.

private.example: This is a private room; please knock.
private.example_zh: 這是私人房間，請先敲門。

prize.example: She won first prize in the contest.
prize.example_zh: 她在比賽中得了第一名。

production.example: The production of the movie took two years.
production.example_zh: 這部電影的製作花了兩年。

progress.example: She is making good progress in English.

project.example: We finished the science project together.
project.example_zh: 我們一起完成了科學專題。

project.example: They projected the movie onto a wall.
project.example_zh: 他們把電影投影到牆上。

promise.example: He kept his promise to help me.
She made a promise to study harder.

proper.example: Wear proper shoes for the hike.

propose.example: She proposed a new plan to the class.
propose.example_zh: 她向全班提出一個新計畫。

propose.example: He proposed to her on the beach.

protect.example: Wear a helmet to protect your head.

protective.example: A mother bird is protective of her eggs.

prove.example: He worked hard to prove he could do it.
prove.example_zh: 他努力證明自己做得到。

pudding.example: We had chocolate pudding for dessert.
pudding.example_zh: 我們的甜點是巧克力布丁。

pumpkin.example: We carved a face on the pumpkin.
pumpkin.example_zh: 我們在南瓜上刻了一張臉。

punish.example: The teacher punished the student for cheating.
punish.example_zh: 老師因作弊而處罰那名學生。

pupil.example: Every pupil in the class passed the exam.
pupil.example_zh: 班上每個學生都通過了考試。

pupil.example: Our pupils get bigger in the dark.
pupil.example_zh: 我們的瞳孔在黑暗中會變大。

puppy.example: The puppy wagged its tail happily.

purple.example: Purple is a mix of red and blue.
purple.example_zh: 紫色是紅色和藍色的混合。

purpose.example: What is the purpose of this meeting?
purpose.example_zh: 這場會議的目的是什麼？

puzzle.example_zh: 他解開了那個困難的謎題。
她奇怪的回答讓我困惑。

quality.example: This shop sells high quality clothes.
quality.example_zh: 這家店賣高品質的衣服。

quantity.example: We need a large quantity of paper.

quiz.example: We had a short English quiz today.
quiz.example_zh: 我們今天有個簡短的英文小考。

railroad-railway.example: The railroad connects the two cities.
railroad-railway.example_zh: 這條鐵路連接兩座城市。

raincoat.example: Wear a raincoat; it's pouring outside.

range.example: The shop sells a wide range of toys.
range.example_zh: 這家店賣各式各樣的玩具。

range.example: Prices range from ten to fifty dollars.
range.example_zh: 價格從十元到五十元不等。

rapid.example: There was a rapid change in the weather.
rapid.example_zh: 天氣發生了快速的變化。

rare.example: It is rare for him to be late.

rat.example: A rat ran across the kitchen.

rather.example: I would rather stay home tonight.

realize.example: I didn't realize how late it was.
realize.example_zh: 我沒意識到已經這麼晚了。

realize.example: She realized her dream of becoming a doctor.
realize.example_zh: 她實現了當醫生的夢想。

receive.example: I received a gift from my friend.

recent.example: In recent years, prices have risen.

record.example: She broke the school running record.
record.example_zh: 她打破了學校的跑步紀錄。

record.example: He recorded the song on his phone.

recover.example: He is recovering from his illness.

refrigerator-fridge.example: Put the milk in the refrigerator.
